PermissionSet.label: OmniStudio - Runtime (Placeholder)
PermissionSet.description: Placeholder permission set reserved for OmniStudio (Salesforce Industries) runtime access. Intentionally grants no object or field permissions yet: the OmniStudio managed package is not confirmed installed in this org (see ARCHITECTURE.md), and referencing its objects/fields here before the package exists would break deployment. Populate this permission set with FlexCard/OmniScript/Integration Procedure runtime access once availability is validated — it already exists in PSG_Provisioning_Specialist so no group membership needs to change when that happens.
